raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Aggajus/ un ẜazzija: Tahdi irr ſchee Lau- 
dis/ un tahda irr ſchi Tauta 
mannâ Preekschâ/ ſakka tas 
KUNGS: Un tahds irr wiſs 
tas Darbs juhſu Rohku/ un ko 
tee tur uppure/ tas irr ne- 
fchkihsts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu jemmeet ar juh- 
ſahm Sirdim wehrâ/ no ſchahs 
Deenas un wehl ilgaki/ pirns 
weens Akmins uhs ohtru tappe 
likts pee ta KUNGA Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pirns ſchahs Leetas no- 
tikke/ kad jeb kaſ nahze pee to 
Labbibas Rohpu no diwideſinite 
Puhreem/ tad bija tur tikai 
definites/ kad winſch pee to Wiḣ- 
na-Spaidu nahze/ un gribbeia 
peezdefinitis Stohpus finelt/ tad 
bija tikai diwideſmits.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es yatittu juhſ ar Bul- 
lu/ Rohſu un Kruffu wiſſa juh- 
ſo Rohku Darbâ/ un juhſ ne at- 
greesatees pee mannim/ ſakka tas 
KiNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nemmeet jelle ar juh- 
ſahm Sirdim wehrâ/ no ſchahs 
Deenas un ilgaki/ no tahs diwi- 
definitis zettortas Deenas tahs 
dewitas Mehnes libds tai Dee- 
nai/ kad tas Pamats pee ta 
KUNGA Namma irr likts/ 
nemmeet ar juhſahm Sirdim 
wehrâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Irrag wehl Schklas 
Riehti? Ir patt to Wihaa-Roh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ku/ un to Wiḣges-Rohku/ u 
Granata- Rohku/ un to E 
Rohku/ kaſ ne irr neſſutchi/ g 
bu es no ſchahs Deenas fi 
tiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta KUNGA Wal 
notifke ohtru Reist uhs Aga 
diwidesmita zettorta Deena 
Mehnes/ un ẜazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Runna uhs Seruba 
to Waldneeku Juhda/ un fa 
Es kustinaſchu tahs Debbeſi 
to Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es apgahſischu 
Gohda-Krehſtu to Walſtibu/ 
isdeldeſchu to Pagatu Wal 
Stiprumu/ un es apgahſi 
tohs Rattus un Sirguſ/ un 
us teem jahj/ tee nokrittihs 
weens eekſch ta ohtra Sohb
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tai Deena/ ſakka 
KUNGS Zebaot: Nemſch 
tewi/ ak Serubabel! tu D 
Sealtieka/ mans Kalps/ fo 
tas KUNGS: Un darriſch 
wi par weenit speeschamu G 
dsenu/ jo tewi esmu es isivehi 
ſakka tas KUNGS Zebaot.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
